action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline GRU-DKT pipeline is valid; 5 epochs produced val AUC ~0.7528 and hidden test eval AUC ~0.7527 in under 1 minute including evaluation. Training/validation losses were still declining, suggesting undertraining. Analysis: Time budget permits a longer run, and eval pipeline works. A larger recurrent state may capture more student history patterns on ASSISTments while staying small. Decision: train the existing DKT model for 20 epochs with hidden_dim=512 and moderate dropout, then submit the best validation checkpoint.
action.command: python train.py --epochs 20 --batch_size 128 --lr 0.001 --weight_decay 0.0001 --emb_dim 128 --hidden_dim 512 --num_layers 1 --dropout 0.2 --seed 42 && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/best.pt --output smoke_predictions.json

eval_result.eval_log:
